title: Revert #5627
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

We just updated from a development version of github.com/containers/image/v5 to a version that was cut from its stable release branch.  Podman's development branch already depends on features which are newer than the image library's stable branch, and vendoring _our_ development branch was breaking compilation over there.

#### How to verify it

https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13808 should be... well, not _happy_, but closer to happy.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Buildah got vendored into podman today, so there probably isn't a big need for the treadmill to be stable. I was just trying to be proactive.
podman might not need it, but `main` in this repository downgraded one of its dependencies unintentionally, and that should matter.
